name: Sabo
description:
__Height:__ ~!100 cm (flashback), 187 cm (current)!~__Age:__ ~!10 (flashback debut), 22 (Post Timeskip)!~__Origin:__ East Blue (Goa Kingdom)
__Affiliations:__ ~!Revolutionary Army; Dadan Family (former); Goa Kingdom (defected)!~~!__Devil Fruit:__ Mera Mera no Mi (Flame-Flame Fruit)!~~!__Devil Fruit Type:__ Logia!~~!__Bounty:__ 602,000,000!~

~!Sabo is the foster brother of Portgas D. Ace and Monkey D. Luffy who lived together with them in Dadan's Place on their childhood. He and Ace had a savings box, which they planned to use when they became Pirates. He is the current user of the Mera Mera no Mi!~ 

~!After some years, he is now the Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army.!~
